Name: Cueola Micochondria
Description: Micochondria — the powerhouse for the talkbacks. Momentary push-to-talk: TKB (Talkback, outs 1-2) and VofU (Voice of the Universe, outs 3-4) via the talkbackd daemon. Hold to talk, release to stop.
Author: Cueola

Actions.Name: TKB — Talkback (outs 1-2)
Actions.Tooltip: TKB. Hold to talk to the crew on the Talkback bus (physical outs 1-2). Release to stop.

Actions.Name: VofU — Voice of the Universe (outs 3-4)
Actions.Tooltip: VofU. Hold to open the Voice of the Universe — the god-mic to the room (physical outs 3-4). Release to stop.
